data.name: evidencemd-fast
data.description: Fast model for quick medical answers with peer-reviewed citations. Optimized for low latency. Does not support thinking mode.

data.name: evidencemd-pro
data.description: Advanced model for deep medical analysis with comprehensive peer-reviewed citations. Supports thinking mode.

data.name: evidencemd-deep
data.description: Highest-capability clinical reasoning model with up to 64k reasoning tokens and 97% GPQA Diamond benchmark performance. Best suited for complex clinical analysis.
